_comment: An Azure Policy that denies the creation of public IP addresses in spoke
resource groups. Hub resources (Firewall, Bastion) need public IPs, but
spoke workloads should NEVER have them.
A public IP on a spoke VM means that VM is directly reachable from the
internet. This bypasses the Azure Firewall entirely — all our network
security rules become useless. It's the #1 security anti-pattern in
This policy should be assigned to spoke resource groups only, NOT the hub.
The hub needs public IPs for Firewall and Bastion.

properties.displayName: Deny public IP addresses on spoke VNets
properties.description: Prevents creation of public IP addresses in spoke resource groups. All internet access must go through the hub Azure Firewall. Assign this policy to spoke resource groups only.
